query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.nickname,
  u.phone,
  u.roles,
  u.teacherAttribute,
  DATE(u.createdAt) as createdDate
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN teachers t ON u.id = t.userId
WHERE u.roles LIKE '%teacher%' 
AND u.deletedAt IS NULL
AND t.id IS NULL;
